block_00: Brexit Drama Carries on… what’s next?
block_01: Theresa May went through a historic defeat this Tuesday as the House of Commons overwhelmingly rejected the Government's Brexit plan. The rejection resulted in the biggest defeat in parliament in 95 years!
block_02: The pound tumbled by 158 pips against the Dollar before recovering by an additional 160 pips.
block_03: Given the humiliating defeat, the following day a no-confidence vote in the government took place. UK PM dodged a bullet by barely surviving the vote. The pound showed little change on Jan. 16 when voting took place, as shown by the graph above.
block_04: Bloomberg reported that there is a possibility that Brexit deadline could be extended towards the second half of the year instead of the original March 29 date. Depending on further developments, further fluctuations in the UK stock market and currency markets alike are expected. Are you taking advantage of the events?
